flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of the Ozarks rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.0k → $22.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at College of the Ozarks rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (78.3% → 90.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of the Ozarks fell 14% between 1997 and 1998 ($2.1k → $1.8k).
